title: NIF registration surface
purpose: Provide the surface through which host-supplied NIFs and the engine's own NIFs are registered with beamr's native registry before any workflow runs. Workflow code reaches Rust through these NIFs; the builder collects them and this module installs them.
task: Implement the runtime NIF registration surface: a type that accumulates NIF entries (the engine's own plus host-supplied) and installs them into beamr's native registry via the RuntimeHandle. Registration must run before any workflow spawns, and a duplicate MFA must surface as EngineError::NifRegistration. This crate only registers NIFs; it does not provide authoring macros (that is aion-nif, cluster AN).

requirements.title: NIF entry collection
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL define a NIF-registration surface that collects native function entries keyed by module/function/arity, accepting both the engine's own NIFs and host-supplied NIFs handed in via the builder.
acceptance: nif.rs defines a NifRegistration (or equivalent) that holds a collection of native entries, each carrying an MFA key, a beamr-compatible native function, and a dirty-scheduler flag.
The surface exposes a method to add a host-supplied set of NIFs and a method to add the engine's own NIFs.
The type is constructible empty and is consumed (not borrowed indefinitely) at install time so entries cannot be added after registration.

requirements.title: Install into beamr before any workflow runs
requirements.spec: THE SYSTEM SHALL install all collected NIF entries into beamr's native registry through the RuntimeHandle during engine build, before any workflow process is spawned. IF a duplicate module/function/arity is registered, THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL return EngineError::NifRegistration and SHALL NOT spawn any workflow.
acceptance: A RuntimeHandle method installs every collected entry into beamr's native registry, honoring the dirty-scheduler flag per entry.
Registration is invoked during build (AE-010 wires the call); this brief provides the install method and its error contract.
A duplicate-MFA registration returns EngineError::NifRegistration { reason } carrying the offending MFA, mapping beamr's NativeRegistrationError::DuplicateMfa.
A unit test registers two NIFs with the same MFA and asserts EngineError::NifRegistration; a second test registers distinct NIFs and asserts they are callable from a trivial test module.

boundaries: SHALL NOT provide NIF-authoring macros or term-mapping helpers — that is aion-nif (cluster AN).
SHALL NOT define which concrete NIFs workflows call (signal/timer/query NIFs are AT; activity NIFs are supplied by the host or aion-nif).
SHALL NOT spawn workflows or wire the builder — registration is invoked by build in AE-010.
verification: Duplicate-MFA path returns EngineError::NifRegistration with no panic.
